records.title: Measurement Lab NDT Data Set
records.license_or_terms: Creative Commons Zero (CC0) / No Rights Reserved as stated by M-Lab
records.citation: The M-Lab NDT Data Set. https://measurementlab.net/tests/ndt
records.intended_gate3_use: Open-data latency/throughput/loss priors for twin-state calibration comparisons
records.download_command: Requires M-Lab Acceptable Use Agreement + GCS/BigQuery access; see https://www.measurementlab.net/data/docs/archival-data/
limitations: Raw archive download requires AUA acceptance; not completed in this automation environment.
Do not claim open-data integration complete until checksummed files are retrieved.

records.title: NTN resilience source-validated simulation parameter pack
records.publisher: gunnchos ntn-resilience-sim (parameters sourced from 3GPP TR 38.821 and configured ranges)
records.source_location: https://www.3gpp.org/ (TR 38.821 Solutions for NR to support non-terrestrial networks)
records.license_or_terms: 3GPP documents subject to 3GPP copyright; parameter values used under research citation practice
records.citation: 3GPP TR 38.821: Solutions for NR to support non-terrestrial networks (NTN).
records.intended_gate3_use: Source-validated simulation assumptions for NTN latency/availability sensitivity
limitations: Qualifies as source_validated_simulation only when all load-bearing parameters include verified source_id metadata.
Configured/synthetic classes alone do not qualify.
